steps.title: Spot the “first” signal
steps.content: The first sentence says the user “first tags the photo with all known information.” This word directly signals that more steps follow in sequence. The transition must show what comes after this initial action.

steps.title: Choose the transition for the next step
steps.content:
”Then” is the natural counterpart to “first”—it marks what happens next in the workflow. “In fact” emphasizes or adds detail (not advancing the sequence), “Likewise” suggests similar actions (but analyzing and tagging differ), and “For example” introduces an instance (not the next sequential step).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
